info.name: Makhani Paneer Tikka Pizza
info.description: A generous spread of rich, buttery makhani sauce topped with soft paneer tikka, onions, capsicum and plenty of melted cheese. Full makhani flavour in every bite.

info.name: Margherita Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: A crunchy thin crust, that rich tomato zing, and a mozzarella melt that makes your soul sigh. Its the classic crush you never get over light, cheesy, and totally date night worthy. (Energy: 883KCal, Carbohydrates: 116gm, Proteins: 36gm, Fats: 29gm, Sodium: 2131mg)

info.name: Double Cheese Margherita Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: A double dose of molten mozzarella magic, Absolutely drool-worthy this ones got that golden thin crust holding down a tomatoey base. (Energy: 1009KCal, Carbohydrates: 116gm, Proteins: 46gm, Fats: 39gm, Sodium: 2388mg)

info.name: Garden Fresh Veggie Thin Crust Pizza
info.description:
"Crisp capsicum, juicy tomatoes, onions, and more stacked on a thin, crunchy crust.
Its a clean, classic veggie bite that light, cheesy, and super satisfying." (Energy: 934KCal, Carbohydrates: 126gm, Proteins: 38gm, Fats: 30gm, Sodium: 2136mg)

info.name: Paneer Golden Delight Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: Soft paneer, golden corn, and a crisp thin crust that never misses. Mildly spiced, cheesy, and full of feel-good flavour this ones all about comfort with a crunch. (Energy: 1137KCal, Carbohydrates: 126gm, Proteins: 50gm, Fats: 48gm, Sodium: 2477mg)

info.name: Tandoori Paneer Tikka Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: Tender paneer tikka, sweet corn, and onions on a light, crispy thin crust. Finished with melty mozzarella, its a mellow mix of smoky, cheesy, and comforting flavours. (Energy: 1148KCal, Carbohydrates: 127gm, Proteins: 51gm, Fats: 48gm, Sodium: 2475mg)

info.name: Signature Korean Paneer Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: Soft paneer tossed in Korean-style sauce on a crunchy thin crust. Cheesy, tangy, and packed with umami goodness this  ones a flavour bomb. (Energy: 1126KCal, Carbohydrates: 139gm, Proteins: 50gm, Fats: 40gm, Sodium: 2817mg)

info.name: Smoked Chicken Sausage Thin Crust Pizza
info.description:
"Loaded with smoky chicken sausage on a crisp thin crust.
Cheesy, hearty, and full of flavour this ones comfort food with a savoury kick." (Energy: 994KCal, Carbohydrates: 123gm, Proteins: 43gm, Fats: 35gm, Sodium: 2134mg)

info.name: BBQ Chicken Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: Tender BBQ chicken on a crisp thin crust, with melty cheese and a hint of sweet heat in every bite. Smoky. Saucy. Straight-up delicious. (Energy: 1049KCal, Carbohydrates: 134gm, Proteins: 42gm, Fats: 37gm, Sodium: 2131mg)

info.name: Tandoori Chicken Tikka Thin Crust Pizza
info.description:
Smoky tandoori flavour, cheesy indulgence, and a perfectly crisp base.
This ones a bold desi bite with juicy chicken tikka and melty goodness in every slice. (Energy: 1109KCal, Carbohydrates: 125gm, Proteins: 61gm, Fats: 32gm, Sodium: 2461mg)

info.name: Golden Chicken Delight Thin Crust Pizza
info.description:
"Juicy chicken tikka, sweet golden corn, and a crunchy thin crust that brings it all together.
Its a cheesy, feel good combo with just the right mix of spice and sweetness in every bite." (Energy: 1097KCal, Carbohydrates: 124gm, Proteins: 60gm, Fats: 32gm, Sodium: 2463mg)

info.name: Roasted Chicken Thin Crust Pizza
info.description:
"Juicy roasted chicken laid over a crisp thin crust, topped with gooey cheese.
Rich, savoury, and satisfyingly simple. " (Energy: 1048KCal, Carbohydrates: 124gm, Proteins: 45gm, Fats: 40gm, Sodium: 2705mg)

info.name: Double Chicken Feast Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: Chicken tikka meets juicy meatballs on a crisp thin crust. Big on flavour, big on bite this double chicken feast is cheesy, meaty, and made to satisfy. (Energy: 1201KCal, Carbohydrates: 128gm, Proteins: 67gm, Fats: 38gm, Sodium: 2701mg)

info.name: Signature Korean Chicken Thin Crust Pizza
info.description: Juicy chicken tossed in Korean-style sauce, laid on a crisp thin crust. Cheesy, savoury, and just the right hit of sweet n spice in every bite. (Energy: 1188KCal, Carbohydrates: 148gm, Proteins: 47gm, Fats: 49gm, Sodium: 3249mg)

info.name: Chicken Maximus Thin Crust Pizza
info.description:
Big on chicken, bigger on flavour.
A meaty medley of juicy chicken chunks, marinara and cheesy goodness stacked on a crisp thin crust for that ultimate bite. (Energy: 1437KCal, Carbohydrates: 139gm, Proteins: 62gm, Fats: 69gm, Sodium: 2373mg)
